2987131.title: SpongeBob
2987131.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

2987180.title: SpongeBob
2987180.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

2987252.title: SpongeBob
2987252.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2987602.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2987602.description: Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him the skateboard he's always wanted. But, Theodore gets sidetracked by his sweet tooth and squanders all of Alvin's money on candy instead. Now Theodore is forced to make up an improbable story.

2987633.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2987633.description: In a rare moment of generosity, Alvin gives his beloved cap to a fan. But soon he's convinced his mojo was in his cap, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert.

2987680.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2987680.description: During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for a real Tasmanian devil. The mixup creates problems all around, especially when Simon reads that the Tasmanian devil is scheduled for surgery. Can Dave and the boys rescue Alvin?!

2987711.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2987711.description: When Rico gets a freaky fortune from his cookie, he initially ignores it. Julien sets out to make Rico's fortune come true. / A female chimp named Lulu arrives at the zoo for a short stay, and Phil is smitten. Unfortunately, Lulu falls for Mason.

2988059.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2988059.description: On watch-duty, Private sees a terrifying Skorka: a sky orca whale. No one believes it exists, so Private sets out to battle the Sorka on his own. / When the penguins are interrupted mid-operation by a nosey scientist, they leave the zoo in danger.

2988120.title: Hier is Pony
2988120.description: When Annie needs a haircut, Pony proves that even a simple task can become a wild adventure. // When Annie and Pony try to give Gerry the best birthday ever, their enthusiasm threatens to make it the worst.

2988223.title: SpongeBob
2988223.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

2988553.title: SpongeBob
2988553.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

2988644.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2988644.description: Timmy accidentally wishes both of his parents into a dangerous, never-ending surf-off! // When Mom and Dad mistake Cosmo for a ghost and restart their failed ghost-hunting business, Timmy wishes that the fairies would pretend to haunt Dimmsdale.

2988695.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2988695.description: The Turners win a contest to be the first family in space, only to learn that it was all a ruse by Dark Laser to imprison them in an alien zoo.

2988759.title: The Loud House
2988759.description: Lincoln is given the responsibility of taking home his classes' tarantula, but it gets loose and wreaks havoc! // Thinking he has the worst chores, Lincoln decides to go on strike until someone will swap chores with him.

2989076.title: Huize Herrie
2989076.description: Lincoln is going to his first rock concert, and Luna is determined to make it the greatest experience ever. // Lincoln finds a letter in the attic leading him to believe there is money hidden within the Loud house!

2989137.title: De Casagrandes
2989137.description: Ronnie Anne and Sid try to take down the obnoxious burger restaurant that opened up across the street. // After picking Par as his new best friend, Bobby realizes he may be in over his head.

2989234.title: De Casagrandes
2989234.description: Ronnie Anne thinks her grandparent's marriage is in trouble after watching a relationship talk show. // Ronnie Anne learns the art of baile folklorico - and that her Tia Frida is one intense instructor!

2989553.title: Breadwinners
2989553.description: SwaySway and Buhdeuce head deep into the bread mines to introduce their number one customer to the Bread Maker! // After breaking each other's favorite possessions, they get into a feud and might just part ways FOREVER!

2989625.title: Breadwinners
2989625.description: Strap on your helmets and hold on to your tail feathers because SwaySway and Buhdeuce are delivering bread in space! // When Ketta crashes at the Swamp Pad, her home modifications drive the guys whoa-ma-gosh quazy.

2989697.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2989697.description: Donatello and April investigate a scientist's disappearance, but discover a conspiracy regarding a bizarre psychic monkey instead.

2989751.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2989751.description: Leo fears his act of mercy has come back to haunt him when Xever holds a local noodle shop owner hostage.

2990103.title: Dorg van Dango
2990103.description: Dorg and the gang are out doing good deeds. But when they're blamed for a town crime spree, they'll need to catch the real thief before it's too late! // After starting a band, Yooki binds the spirit of a rock star to Dorg's guitar.

2990170.title: Ollie's Pack
2990170.description: Ollie tracks down a vindictive monster who is vandalizing Portshill and trying to pin it on him. // Ollie's feelings about Turner unleashes a shadow monster that gets its power from negativity.

2990217.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2990217.description: King Julien observes children chasing each other, calling out "cooties". He deduces that girls pass this wretched "cooties" with a simple touch. // When Rico crashes the Penguins car and rebuilds it himself, it becomes "possessed" and targets Rico.

2990561.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2990561.description: On watch-duty, Private sees a terrifying Skorka: a sky orca whale. No one believes that it exists, so Private sets out to battle the Sorka on his own.

2990587.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2990587.description: Dad keeps trying to help Timmy with his homework. // Remy Buxaplenty has come home from military school for spring break. All he can talk about is how great his new school is, making Timmy, Chester and AJ very jealous in the process.

2990665.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2990665.description: Timmy's got all this merchandise from the 'Wet Willie' movie but it won't help him breathe underwater. // Timmy wishes for a magical device that allows him to change places with people in order to pass Mr. Crocker's test.

2990751.title: SpongeBob
2990751.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2991070.title: SpongeBob
2991070.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2991132.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2991132.description: When a big fish starts terrorizing the inhabitants of the duck pond, Skipper leads his team on a mission to eliminate the aquatic menace. / When a beautiful female falcon crash-lands in the zoo, Skipper insists that she stays to recuperate.

2991211.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
2991211.description: After misplacing the shrink ray Captain Man and Kid Danger have to battle The Toddler to win it back. // When Captain Man & Kid Danger find a golden pickle in their burger they win a private tour of the secretive factory where Beefo's Burgers are made.

3001822.title: De Casagrandes
3001822.description: Ronnie Anne tries to convince her Dad to move to the city while he is visiting. With the help of Sid, she devices a plan that seems too good to fail.

3001876.title: Huize Herrie
3001876.description: Lincoln devises a plan to get the best seat in the car for a long, family, road trip. // Lincoln tries to prove he's mature enough to have dinner at the adult table, leaving the kiddie table behind him.

3001964.title: The Loud House
3001964.description: Ronnie Anne wants to go downtown. But her grandparents think it's too dangerous, so they decide to spy on her.

3001997.title: Hier is Pony
3001997.description: Pony's constant distractions threaten to derail Annie's part of a science project Gerry is counting on her to do. // On a trip to the bookstore, Annie and Pony discover the comfiest chair in the world that also may have superpowers.

3002821.title: Hier is Pony
3002821.description: When Annie needs a haircut, Pony proves that even a simple task can become a wild adventure. // When Annie and Pony try to give Gerry the best birthday ever, their enthusiasm threatens to make it the worst.

3002887.title: SpongeBob
3002887.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3002956.title: Dorg van Dango
3002956.description: Dorg and the gang are out doing good deeds. But when they're blamed for a town crime spree, they'll need to catch the real thief before it's too late! // After starting a band, Yooki binds the spirit of a rock star to Dorg's guitar.

3003029.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3003029.description: Weary of using his simple bo staff to fight the technologically advanced Kraang, Donatello creates Metalhead, a remote-controlled robot turtle, to fight in his place.

3003841.title: Breadwinners
3003841.description: SwaySway and Buhdeuce become obsessed with winning a toy out of the new crane game that's been installed at Pumpers. / When Buhdeuce gets a bad haircut, he goes berserks, and now SwaySway has to calm his buddy down before he gets busted by Rambamboo.

3003921.title: SpongeBob
3003921.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3003954.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3003954.description: During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for a real Tasmanian devil. The mixup creates problems all around, especially when Simon reads that the Tasmanian devil is scheduled for surgery. Can Dave and the boys rescue Alvin?!

3004008.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3004008.description: Dave can't help but notice that his Chipmunks are growing up and becoming independent. Anxious to spend more time with them, he only ends up suffocating them. In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend.

3004849.title: Huize Herrie
3004849.description: When all 10 of Lincoln's sisters ask him to cover for them on the same day, Lincoln has his hands full. // Bobby and Lori go on a double date with Lincoln and Bobby's little sister, Ronnie Anne.

3004967.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3004967.description: Timmy wishes up a machine that allows him to merge with other items to become half-Timmy/half-whatever. // Timmy's tired of technology taking over and ruining his life so he wishes for a simpler world.

3005020.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3005020.description: Shya! Mark Chang is called back to Yugopotamia to become king while his father, under attack from a mystery assailant, flees for his life. // Dark Laser's back and tries to make Timmy his apprentice!

3005853.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3005853.description: The Turtles enlist the help of the Mighty Mutanimals to stop Bebop and Rocksteady.

3005943.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3005943.description: The Turtles are transported to an alternate dimension where they meet the rabbit samurai, Miyamoto Usagi.

3006009.title: SpongeBob
3006009.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3006733.title: SpongeBob
3006733.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3006782.title: Ollie's Pack
3006782.description: After Ollie and Captain Wowski have a spat, CW is mistaken for a stray cat and gets captured by Animal Control. // Preparing to meet a bully after school, Bernie finds a monster device in CW's closet that can help him.

3006838.title: Huize Herrie
3006838.description: Zach and Rusty fake an alien landing that sends the whole town on a hunt for little green men. // Clyde thinks he's a shoe-in for the Glee Club solo, until Lincoln accidentally auditions and lands the part.

3006906.title: De Casagrandes
3006906.description: Ronnie Anne and Sid are pumped up for their sleepover, but Carl and Adelaide might ruin the day! // After a disagreement with Abuelo, Bobby goes to work for Mr. Hong to try out his new business ideas.

3007737.title: Kung Fu Panda : l'incroyable légende
3007737.description: When Po is possessed by the ghost of evil Master Ding, it's up to Tigress to save him before Ding can unleash his powers and enslave the Valley of Peace.

3007772.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3007772.description: Master Chao visits the valley to oversee a Tournament. Shifu is convinced that Po and Master Chao want to replace him. Shifu's old enemy, Pai Mei, arrives in the middle of the tournament and threatens to destroy Shifu.
